name: Environment list is org-scoped
description: TC-005-082/083: GET /api/environments must not return environments from other organizations

steps.name: listing environments with a bogus org ID yields no leakage
REQUIRE: Request should complete without error
REQUIRE: Response should not be nil

parameters.name: Actual
